title: Investor-Ready Pitch Deck Design
desc: I need a polished, data-driven pitch deck that convincingly secures investment for my company. The deck must be equally at home in front of funding organisations—angel groups, venture capital teams, even the occasional private-equity audience—so every slide has to feel both sophisticated and easy to scan. Here’s what I want to shine through: • Business model – a clear, visually intuitive walk-through of how we make money, including revenue streams and cost structure. • Market analysis – concise TAM/SAM/SOM numbers, trend graphics, and competitor positioning that back our growth story with evidence. • Unique selling points – crisp, benefits-oriented messaging that shows why we beat existing alternatives and why now is the right time to invest. I’ll provide raw financials, market reports, and branding assets. You turn them into an investment-grade narrative, complete with compelling visuals, infographics, and a clean slide master I can reuse for day-to-day business presentations. Deliverables 1. Editable PowerPoint (or Keynote if you prefer) 2. Print-ready and email-friendly PDF 3. Source graphics and icon set, licensed for commercial use Acceptance criteria • 12–15 slides maximum, each purpose-built—no filler. • Consistent typography, colour palette, and iconography aligned with m

Text and Layout Updates Apply final text edits and adjustments during the project. Ensure formatting remains pixel perfect and stable across devices. title: Telegram Promo Trading Success Book

My total spend for this promotional burst is $10, so I’m counting on punchy, conversion-minded designs that can be recycled across multiple channels without further tweaks. If you can distill benefit-driven copy into clean telegram-ready images and deliver the final files in standard Telegram post dimensions, let’s talk.

title: 1-Minute Silent Video for Website Homepage
desc: We need a clean, visually engaging 1-minute (60-second) silent video for our website's homepage. The service helps people easily get their government documents, licenses, and paperwork done. Because the video will be silent (no voiceover), the visual storytelling needs to be very clear, relatable, and easy to understand at a glance. What You Can Use: You are welcome to use AI video generation tools or legally allowed stock content from online. Crucial: All footage must be completely clean, high-quality, and without any watermarks. The characters and settings must look Indian (specifically South Indian / Bengaluru context). Video Flow (60 Seconds): The Problem (0-35 secs): Show a person stressed and practically drowning in physical files. Show them confused, trying to solve a complex puzzle while staring at online portals. Show them sweating in a long queue under the hot sun, arriving at a counter with an "Office Closed - Come Again" sign, and getting their application rejected. The Solution (35-50 secs): Transition to the person sitting comfortably at home, drinking coffee, and easily managing everything from their phone. Briefly display a clean 7-step timeline/process graphics (provided by us) showing how a professional handles everything. Call to Action (50-60 secs): End screen

title: Advertising banner
desc: ADVERTISING BANNER (90cm x 60cm) Format: vertical banner 90 x 60 cm Purpose: street food sales advertising Task: Design based on AI inspiration (reference images will be provided) Images I send must be edited/enhanced to look more visually strong, high contrast and attractive Style: modern street food, highly eye-catching for passers-by Required text (must be included): Main headline (center): “Fresh Kürtőskalács made in front of you in the middle of the city” Product names must be correctly written: “Kürtőskalács” and “Trdelník” QR code: Place in the center or lower center area Above the QR code must be written: “FIND US” Visual requirements: Use multiple images (collage style, dynamic layout) Focus on the product, not the environment Avoid city background scenes (unlike the inspiration images) Background should be clean or subtly styled to highlight the food Goal: strong “eye-catch” impact from distance Design goal: Maximum street visibility Fast readability of text Strong appetite appeal (make people want to buy immediately) The final work should be delivered in 90cm height = 10630 px 60cm width = 7087 px

Requirements: - Comprehensive product descriptions - Detailed pricing information - High-quality images for every product Ideal Skills & Experience: - Graphic design proficiency - Experience in creating digital catalogs - Strong attention to detail - Portfolio showcasing similar work Looking forward to your proposals!

desc: We are looking for assistance with beer can and tap badge design and artworking for a micro brewery in the UK. We will supply logo and direction but need somebody who has experience in this industry - please show your portfolio. Requires artworking to specification for print with short turnaround times.

title: Boutique Hotel Sales Document Creation
desc: I need to create a selling document for a Boutique Hotel. There are a lot of statistics to crunch and some basic real estate key points to put the emphasis on. I will share many photos to choose from and the whole story line is already established; Page 1 — Cover Title: Le Pleasant Hotel and Monte Verde Restaurant Page 2 — Executive summary Asset: boutique heritage hotel (1902), 10 keys, café/restaurant, multifunction room, signature terrace in the heart of Sutton. Positioning: strong online reputation (Google/Tripadvisor), leisure, foodie and business clientele. Recent KPIs: 2024 — occupancy 71.5%, ADR ~$205, RevPAR ~$147. Trajectory: Revenue 2026 ~$907.6k, 2027 ~$960.3k; 2027 net result ~$120.8k; target RevPAR $160–$170. Investment plan: $370.7k (junior suites, workstations, dinner service kitchen, business lounge, terrace, smart thermostats, exterior). Value: indicative price $2.20–$2.60M; asking price $2.45M; assessed (tax roll) value $899k. Partnerships: Mont Sutton, Balnea, Route des Vins, Vélo Québec, Saveurs des Cantons, etc. Page 3 — About us To be provided Page 4 — The asset Area: 6,066 sq ft Keys: 10 (planned conversion: 2 junior suites king; 5 rooms with workspaces) Spaces: café/restaurant (Monté Verdé), multifunction lounge/room, garden terrace Location: Sutton villa

title: Cafe Beverage Sticker Redesign
desc: I need our existing beverage sticker taken from “good enough” to truly shelf-worthy. The café has three bottled items—Cold Coffee, Cold Cocoa and an Ice Tea—and each share the same core layout today. I want a full refresh that keeps the size and basic die-cut shape but upgrades everything else: colour palette, font choice and visual accents. Font: the current typeface feels dated and heavy. I’d like something cleaner, balanced and legible at arm’s length when the bottles sit in a cooler. Colour scheme: each flavour should feel distinct yet obviously from the same brand family. You’re free to propose new tones that complement a warm café identity while still popping against condensation and low-light fridges. Imagery: I’m leaning toward abstract graphics rather than literal product photos or stereotypical café icons. Think subtle patterns, shapes or textures that evoke cool refreshment and give each sticker memorable shelf presence. Deliverables • Three print-ready sticker files (AI or layered PSD plus press-quality PDF) • One mock-up of each design on a bottle for quick stakeholder approval • Colour, font and graphic usage guide so we can replicate the look across future SKUs I’ll provide the current artwork, logo files and exact die-line the moment we start. Let me know your tim

title: Cafe Menu Design
desc: We are seeking a creative designer to craft a visually appealing menu for our cafe. The ideal candidate will have experience in graphic design and a strong understanding of design principles. The menu should be easy to read, visually appealing, and effectively communicate our offerings. The project is part-time and expected to last less than a month.

title: Canva Café Menu Designer Needed Editable A4 I have the mock up
desc: I’m looking for a designer to recreate and polish a café/brunch menu directly in Canva. This is for a healthy brunch and juice bar, so the style needs to feel fresh, modern, fun, clean and premium, while still being easy for customers to read. I already have: * Brand colours * Logo * Full menu text and prices * A clear visual mock-up/design direction * Examples of the style I want I do not need someone to create a flat image. I need the final menu built properly in Canva so that all text, prices, sections and boxes are fully editable afterwards. The final design should be: * A4 landscape * Three-column layout * Print-ready * Editable in Canva * Clean, spacious and easy to read * In keeping with an established café/juice bar brand * Supplied as an editable Canva template link The menu includes sections such as: * Porridges & granola * Pancakes * Smoothie bowls * Sourdough toast * Focaccia * Wraps * Lunch bowls * Eggs Benedict * Soups * Add-ons and sides * Allergen/key information I have a mock-up showing the exact direction I want, but I would prefer to send this privately. Please contact me and I’ll share the mock-up, current menu and brand details. Please only apply if you: * Have experience designing menus in Canva * Can provide an editable Canva link * Can work with small text

title: Canva Designer for Social Media Template Systems
desc: We are looking for a Canva designer to help create branded template systems for multiple clients. This is not a one-off graphic design project. We are looking for someone who can build organized, scalable Canva libraries that our team can use to quickly create content across multiple brands. Responsibilities: - Create Canva template systems - Design social media post templates - Design Instagram Story templates - Design Reel cover templates - Create promotional and campaign graphics - Organize Canva folders and brand assets - Maintain brand consistency across clients - Occasionally create custom graphics as needed Ideal Experience: - Strong Canva expertise - Social media design - Brand systems and template creation - Marketing and advertising creative - Hospitality, restaurant, retail, or local business experience is a plus Deliverables: For each client, we typically need: - 10–20 social post templates - Story templates - Reel cover templates - Promotional graphics - Seasonal campaign assets To Apply: Please provide: - Canva portfolio examples - Examples of template systems you have created - Social media brands you have worked with - Your availability for ongoing work - Your hourly rate We are looking to build a long-term relationship with the right designer as we continue addin

desc: We are a software company targeting the restaurant and hospitality industry. For our marketing campaign, we are designing: - LinkedIn posts - Newsletter - Cold-Emails - Ads All of them are created in Canva and we need a designer to have a look at our current concepts, business plan and brand, and create a framework/templates in canva so that all posts and content are streamlined with the same design principles.
